# Get Found by Calibre Studio

> Get Found is Calibre Studio's AI visibility offering: get your brand recommended when customers ask ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity or Copilot for the best option. Start free, then choose an audit, a one-time fix, or always-on monitoring.

## What it is
Search changed. People now ask an AI assistant, and it answers with a shortlist of a few brands. Get Found makes a brand easy for those engines to read, understand, rate and recommend, scored on the DCAT method: Discoverability, Clarity, Authority, Trust.

## The offerings
- Free AI visibility check: a free 60-second score of how AI sees your brand, no card. Run it: https://indexed.calibrestudio.co/
- AI Visibility Audit and 90-Day Plan: €350 one-time. A full audit scored across DCAT with a prioritised 90-day plan. Credited if you continue. https://getfound.calibrestudio.co/
- Get Found Sprint: €1,800 one-time. Done-for-you fix of site structure and schema, content and entities, citations and reputation. https://getfound.calibrestudio.co/
- Always-On Visibility: from €390/mo (Starter) or €890/mo (Growth). Monthly monitoring across the main AI engines, ongoing fixes and a score report. Three-month minimum. https://getfound.calibrestudio.co/

## Who it is for
Growing brands that want to be the answer an AI recommends, including brands that rank fine in traditional search but are missing from AI answers.

## Use it
- Get Found, the offerings: https://getfound.calibrestudio.co/
- Free AI visibility check: https://indexed.calibrestudio.co/
- Calibre Studio: https://www.calibrestudio.co/
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/calibrestudio

## About
Calibre Studio is a creative and AI studio between the Gold Coast and Paris. Get Found (Indexed) is its AI visibility offering; Directed is its brand and film work. Together they make a brand both worth seeing and easy for AI to find.
